I build things for two reasons.

Curiosity.

"If I want to understand how something works, I build it."

Utility.

"If a task feels repetitive, I automate it."

<THE PERSON BEHIND THE CODE>

Integrated MCA student at IIPS DAVV, builder of AI powered applications, automation enthusiast, public speaker, journalism enthusiast, and someone deeply interested in technology, policy, geopolitics, and the way they shape society.

5+ Major Applications Built
4+ Leadership & Civic Roles
100% Curiosity Driven
PROJECT SHOWCASE

Where Curiosity Meets Execution

Each application is an exploration into real-time systems, AI workflows, cognitive training, or public policy.

Multiplayer & Real-Time Live Interactive Demo

MathPot

Real-time multiplayer mathematics game built to understand multiplayer architectures, low-latency state synchronization, and high-concurrency WebSocket systems.

WebSockets Node.js Redis React
mathpot-arena.live
You: 0
15s
Opponent: 0
Ready to test your reflex?
Source Code Live Site
Cognitive Training & Wellness Interactive Simulation

Focus App (Cognitive Flow)

Attention and concentration training platform designed to improve cognitive focus, mental stamina, and stress reduction through interactive neuroscience-backed exercises.

React WebAudio API Tailwind CSS State Machine
cognitive-flow.vercel.app
Tap to Breathe
Source Code Live Site
Simulation & AI LLM Interactive Scenario

Geopolitics Simulator (Make My Country)

An immersive simulation where users become leaders of major nations, balancing economic stability, diplomatic alliances, and military readiness against real-world policy dilemmas.

Next.js OpenAI API Chart.js Tailwind
make-my-country.vercel.app
Economy: 78%
Diplomacy: 65%
Security: 80%
CRISIS EVENT #042

Global AI Chip Shortage Detected. How will you respond?

Source Code Live Site
AI Productivity & Workflow Live AI Parser Demo

MakeMyList

AI powered productivity tool that transforms chaotic brain dumps and raw ideas into cleanly categorized, actionable lists with smart deadlines and priority tagging.

Python FastAPI LLM NLP Vue.js
make-my-list.vercel.app
High 🎯 Prep keynote speech
Med 📚 Research AI policy
Dev 🐳 Fix Docker bug
Source Code Live Site
Research, Journalism & Discourse Editorial Initiative

Yuva Drishti

A modern research and journalism initiative focused on youth perspectives, public affairs, ethical AI governance, and meaningful socio-political discourse. Designed as a digital publication and debate forum.

Editorial CMS Next.js SSR SEO Optimized Community Forum
nss-yuva-drishti.vercel.app
FEATURED ESSAY • JULY 2026

The Algorithmic Public Square: How AI Models Shape Civic Discourse

An empirical examination of how recommendation algorithms and generative models influence youth perspectives on governance and democratic participation...

Read full investigation →
Visit Publication Archive
THE JOURNEY

Leadership & Technology Experience

A timeline of high-impact technical roles, community leadership, and civic innovation.

IT Intern Indore Municipal Corporation

Built a smart tourist assistance chatbot and contributed to public-sector technology initiatives under the Smart City ecosystem, optimizing civic data accessibility for thousands of citizens and visitors.

Smart City Chatbot Architecture GovTech
Events and Operations Head NSS (National Service Scheme)

Managed end-to-end event execution, campus coordination, logistics, and large-scale volunteer engagement for community service and youth development programs.

Operations Logistics Management Leadership
Core Team Member IEEE Student Branch

Contributed to cutting-edge technical initiatives, coding bootcamps, workshops, and inter-collegiate technical symposiums while building vibrant developer communities.

Technical Workshops Engineering Community
Vice President Sanchar Sangram

Helped grow a premier campus debate and public speaking community from the ground up while organizing high-level intellectual discussions, parliamentary debates, and rhetorical competitions.

Public Speaking Debate Strategy Oratory

✍️ Vihan's Field Notes
<CORE PHILOSOPHY>

"I learn by building."

Every project starts with a question. Instead of searching endlessly for answers, I build something and learn through the process.

Question
Build
Master
START A CONVERSATION

Let's build something interesting.

Whether you have a product idea, a speaking opportunity, or just want to debate geopolitics and AI—my inbox is open.
